verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed a coherent, multi-agent analysis of a visually ambiguous image. While the final prediction (Argentina) was incorrect, the agents' reasoning was internally consistent and grounded in the visual evidence (e.g., pole design, scrub type). The failure was due to the image lacking the specific diagnostic features (signage, unique flora) required to distinguish between the Karoo (South Africa) and Patagonia (Argentina).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the arid plateau and scrub.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the road and poles.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: South Africa was not in the candidate pool (Path B restricted to South America and Oceania).
